sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108659" key="u(polale/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπολᾰλέω</orth>, <sense id="n108659.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whisper,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:137:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
